comments.author: acme_hr
comments.text:
Acme Robotics | Remote (US) | Full-time

We're a Series B robotics company building warehouse automation. Looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to work on our fleet coordination service.

Stack: TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Kubernetes, AWS.

Remote-first, US timezones. $170k-$210k + equity.

comments.author: foundry_labs
comments.text:
Foundry Labs | San Francisco, CA | Onsite

Early-stage startup, in-office 4 days/week. Hiring a Junior Frontend Engineer to work on our React + GraphQL dashboard.

New grads welcome.
